en.title: Editor → template service → renderer: a single document generation lane.
en.description: Epistola Suite is unapologetically about generation, not analytics or AI insights. Authors design templates, developers automate the render API, and platform teams run the Helm stack — all centered on getting compliant PDFs out the door.

lanes.title: Business authors
lanes.body: Drag/drop blocks, manage schema examples, and preview PDFs with inline expression evaluation.
bullets: Block library: text, tables, columns, clauses, headers, footers

lanes.title: Developers
lanes.body: Version templates in Git, run Testcontainers suites, and invoke the OpenAPI-render API from orchestrators.
bullets: API commands for template + theme automation
Adaptive batch jobs with job states and metrics

lanes.title: Platform ops
lanes.body: Deploy Helm charts with Keycloak/OIDC, monitor renders, and promote versions across environments.

nl.title: Editor → template service → renderer: een enkele documentgeneratie lane.
nl.description: Epistola Suite is onvergeeflijk gericht op generatie, niet op analytics of AI inzichten. Auteurs ontwerpen templates, developers automatiseren de render API, en platform teams draaien de Helm stack — allemaal gericht op het produceren van compliant PDFs.

lanes.title: Business auteurs
lanes.body: Drag/drop blokken, beheer schema voorbeelden, en preview PDFs met inline expression evaluatie.
bullets: Block library: tekst, tabellen, kolommen, clausules, headers, footers

lanes.title: Developers
lanes.body: Versioneer templates in Git, run Testcontainers suites, en roep de OpenAPI-render API aan vanuit orchestrators.
bullets: API commando's voor template + theme automatisering
Adaptive batch jobs met job states en metrics

lanes.title: Platform ops
lanes.body: Deploy Helm charts met Keycloak/OIDC, monitor renders, en promoot versies over omgevingen.
